settings.eyebrow: Crafted in France. Culminated in India.
settings.heading:
Worn once.
Never forgotten.

settings.label: The Collection
settings.heading: Find the one that wears like you.
settings.quiz_label: Need help choosing? Let the quiz match you

settings.name: Bequest
settings.subtitle: Citrus woody · Confident
settings.notes: A crisp opening of bergamot and lemon moves into lavender, cashmere wood and a warm ambroxan trail.

settings.name: Dame
settings.subtitle: Floral vanilla · Luminous
settings.notes: Peach, bergamot and soft florals settle into sandalwood, vanilla and white musk for an elegant finish.

settings.name: Velvet
settings.subtitle: Fresh green · Limited
settings.notes: A calm green composition with cardamom, lavender, moss, vetiver and tonka for effortless daily wear.

settings.label: Watch & Shop
settings.heading: See the mood. Shop the scent.
settings.subheading: Browse Chantèro moments in motion. Tap any reel to watch closer and continue straight to the fragrance page.

settings.label: Bundle Atelier
settings.heading: Create a scent edit for every occasion.
settings.body: Pair a daily signature with an evening scent, add discovery vials, and unlock automatic savings when your selection includes two or more items.

settings.label: Discovery First
settings.heading: Wear it for a day. Then decide.
settings.body: Fragrance changes with skin, heat and time. Start with a 3ml vial, live with the scent, and move to a full bottle only when it feels right.

settings.label: Gifting
settings.heading: A gift that feels chosen, not rushed.
settings.note: Add a note, choose wrapping and make the order feel personal.

settings.subtitle: Signature choice
settings.name: Signature Gift Box
settings.description: A full-size Chantèro fragrance presented with refined packaging and space for a personal note.

settings.subtitle: For two
settings.name: The Duo
settings.description: Two complementary signatures in one elevated set. Ideal for celebrations, weddings and shared rituals.

settings.subtitle: Safest gift
settings.name: Discovery Gift Set
settings.description: A discovery set for the person who wants to experience each scent before selecting their bottle.

settings.label: Customer Notes
settings.heading: What people notice first.
settings.subheading: Longevity, presentation and the feeling of finding a scent that finally feels personal.

settings.name: Aarav M.
settings.body: Bequest has that clean, expensive opening I wanted. It settles warm, stays close enough for work and still gets noticed by evening.

settings.name: Nisha R.
settings.body: Dame feels soft but not ordinary. The sample made the decision easy, and the full bottle looks beautiful on my dresser.

settings.name: Kabir S.
settings.body: The discovery set helped me compare properly. Velvet became the one I kept reaching for: fresh, calm and easy to wear.

settings.text: Chantèro was created for people who love fine fragrance but want to experience it on their own terms.
We bring French formulation, considered packaging and discovery-first buying together so choosing your scent feels intimate, not intimidating.

settings.quote: The right fragrance does not enter loudly. It stays, softens, and becomes part of how people remember you.

settings.label: Experience Counters
settings.heading: Smell it first. Choose it slowly.
settings.subheading: Visit a partner location to test Chantèro on skin and compare the dry-down before you buy.

settings.label: Scent Match
settings.heading: Let your routine choose your fragrance.
settings.body: Tell us where you wear scent, how bold you like it, and which notes pull you in. We will suggest the best Chantèro match.

settings.heading: Be first to know what arrives next.
settings.subheading: Receive launch previews, private bundle privileges, scent education and early access to limited drops.
